<think> The question asks for the English dubbing company of Zanmase Truesdale, who is voiced by Jesús Barrero in anime. I need to identify the anime first, then find out which company produced its English dub.

To identify the anime, I can look up anime roles of Jesús Barrero and find that he voiced Zanmase Truesdale in "Yu-Gi-Oh! Duel Monsters."

Now, I need to find out which company produced the English dub of "Yu-Gi-Oh! Duel Monsters." I can check the IMDb page for the English version of the anime and find that 4Kids Entertainment produced it.

<answer> 4Kids Entertainment </answer>
